turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, uh, is this Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, good morning! You've reached Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic, Pune. How may I assist you today?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, so I wanted to, umm, book an appointment. My wife needs to see a gynecologist. Sometime this week if possible.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course! We have Dr. Priya Deshmukh available in gynecology. She has slots on Wednesday at 11 AM and Thursday at 3 PM. Which would suit you better?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thursday 3 PM should be fine. Her name is Kavita Nair, and the number is 9823041567.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. I've booked an appointment for Mrs. Kavita Nair with Dr. Priya Deshmukh this Thursday at 3 PM. You'll receive a confirmation SMS shortly. Is there anything else?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: No no, that's all. Thank you so much.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're welcome! Have a great day.
